query:
SELECT 
  'viral_examples' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM viral_examples
UNION ALL
SELECT 'embeddings', COUNT(*) FROM viral_example_embeddings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'clusters', COUNT(*) FROM viral_clusters
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_accounts', COUNT(*) FROM ip_accounts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'success_factors', COUNT(*) FROM ip_success_factors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ip_posts', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'viral_with_1000_likes', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE likes >= 1000
UNION ALL
SELECT 'viral_with_5000_likes', COUNT(*) FROM ip_posts WHERE likes >= 5000;
